title: XanaNode Core SDK Package Manifest
summary: package.json is elevated as a first-class Core SDK artifact in the XanaNode Core SDK substrate.
content:
{
  "name": "@xananode/core",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "description": "Reference Core SDK for reading, validating, building, and exporting XanaNode substrates independent of any renderer.",
  "type": "module",
  "main": "src/index.js",
  "exports": {
    ".": "./src/index.js",
    "./cli": "./src/cli.js",
    "./projection": "./src/projection.js"
  },
  "bin": {
    "xananode": "./bin/xananode.js",
    "xananode-core": "./bin/xananode.js"
  },
  "files": [
    "src",
    "bin",
    "schemas",
    "registry",
    "packs",
    "templates",
    "vendor/xananode-protocol",
    "README.md",
    "LICENSE"
  ],
  "scripts": {
    "test": "node --test test/*.test.js",
    "validate:example": "node ./bin/xananode.js validate ./templates/basic",
    "build:example": "node ./bin/xananode.js build ./templates/basic --out ./tmp-example-public",
    "build:canonical-pack": "node ./bin/xananode.js build-pack --out ./tmp-xananode-canonical-pack",
    "update:canonical-pack": "node ../scripts/sync-core-canonical-fixture.mjs",
    "package:win": "node ../scripts/package-executables.mjs core",
    "protocol:init": "git submodule update --init --recursive vendor/xananode-protocol",
    "protocol:update": "git submodule update --init --remote --merge vendor/xananode-protocol",
    "protocol:status": "git submodule status --recursive"
  },
  "keywords": [
    "xananode",
    "knowledge-graph",
    "substrate",
    "provenance",
    "static-site",
    "semantic-web"
  ],
  "license": "Apache-2.0",
  "dependencies": {
    "ajv": "^8.17.1",
    "ajv-formats": "^3.0.1",
    "fast-glob": "^3.3.3",
    "js-yaml": "^4.1.0",
    "commander": "^12.1.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {}
}
